stemHtml: Which of the following statements concerning trade winds is correct?

options.a: They occur only in the lower part of the troposphere and are more pronounced over the oceans than over the continents
options.b: They reach up to the tropopause and are more pronounced over the continents than over the oceans
options.c: They occur only in the lower part of the troposphere and are more pronounced over the continents than over the oceans
options.d: They reach up to the tropopause and are more pronounced over the oceans than over the continents
